title: Reporting on Green Procurement - Canada.ca
content:
## Reporting on Green Procurement
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada is bound by the Federal Sustainable Development Act and was required to develop a 2020 to 2023 Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy (DSDS).
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada has developed its corresponding 2020-21 DSDS Report, including applicable reporting on green procurement activities. This report can be found on Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada’s website .
